honest_issues: The real fixed-harness GATE-1b re-measurement was not run locally because the required raw body_mesh monolith is VM-only and large; acceptance here is fixture-level only.

The prior live evidence still stands as a pre-fix measurement bug diagnosis: raw pred_keypoints_3d grounded with pred_cam_t measured p95 23.4mm, while the old harness reported 262.3mm on the same run.
